description_long: This is a modern, minimalist shelving unit featuring two natural wood shelves supported by a black metal frame. The shelves have a live-edge design, giving them an organic, irregular contour along the front edge. The frame consists of two X-shaped metal legs on either side, connected by a horizontal support bar for added stability. The wood appears to be finished with a matte or semi-matte coating, highlighting the grain and texture. The overall structure is open, with no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, making it suitable for displaying items or storing objects in an accessible manner. The design is both functional and stylish, fitting well in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, open shelving unit with two live-edge wood shelves and a black X-frame metal support. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from an angled side, showing both shelves, the X-frame legs, and the connecting support bar.
description_view_1: A side profile highlights the X-shaped metal leg and the thickness of the wooden shelves.
description_view_2: A rear view displays the back edge of the shelves and the horizontal support bar connecting the legs.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile again emphasizes the X-frame and the live-edge contour of the shelves.
